logo.title: Smart Arena
ov.title: Overview
ov.hero.title: Smart Sports Arena
ov.hero.sub: A centralized control system for managing smart displays, dynamic court lighting, sport mode configurations, and automated event scenarios — all from one unified dashboard.

hall.sub: Interactive visualization — click any screen to control it

screens.sub: Manage individual and grouped display content

lighting.sub: Manage ambient lighting, LED lines, and intensity
lm.training.desc: Full brightness for focused training sessions
lm.health.desc: Soft green tones for wellness campaigns
lm.safety.desc: High visibility yellow for safety procedures
court.title: Court Modes
court.sub: Select sport configuration — lines update live in the hall view

court.multi.name: Multi-purpose
court.multi.desc: All court markings overlaid and color-coded
scenarios.title: Smart Scenarios
scenarios.sub: One-click automation — applies court mode, lighting, and content simultaneously
